mapper.select: SELECT gi.*, cg.group_name AS group_name, u.nickname AS from_user_nickname, u.avatar AS from_user_avatar FROM group_invite gi LEFT JOIN chat_group cg ON gi.group_id = cg.id LEFT JOIN user u ON gi.from_user_id = u.id WHERE gi.to_user_id = #{toUserId} ORDER BY gi.create_time DESC

SELECT gi.*, cg.group_name AS group_name, u.nickname AS from_user_nickname, u.avatar AS from_user_avatar FROM group_invite gi LEFT JOIN chat_group cg ON gi.group_id = cg.id LEFT JOIN user u ON gi.from_user_id = u.id WHERE gi.id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO group_invite (group_id, from_user_id, to_user_id, message, status) VALUES (#{groupId}, #{fromUserId}, #{toUserId}, #{message}, #{status})
mapper.update: UPDATE group_invite SET status = #{status}, handle_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
